# SBDC find your center ZIP and county locator

Review date: 2026-06-28
Organization: UH Texas Gulf Coast SBDC Network
Local area: Southeast Texas and Houston-area counties
Office or partner: Find Your SBDC locator

## BOSS routing summary
Use when BOSS cannot confidently choose the correct SBDC center from ZIP alone.

## Local service area
- Locator supports search by ZIP code or county.
- UH SBDC Network serves 32 counties through multiple centers.
- ZIP 77084 can involve local boundary questions.

## Local services or resource types
- SBDC center lookup
- County-based routing
- Local advising appointment route
- Office directory navigation

## Best-fit users
- Users asking for nearest SBDC
- Users in boundary ZIP codes
- Users who know county but not center

## BOSS intake questions
- What is your business ZIP code, county, and physical operating address?
- Are you operating from home, online, mobile, commercial space, or multiple locations?
- Are you looking for startup help, existing-business advising, funding readiness, contracts, permits, certifications, training, or mentoring?
- Is the business already legally formed and for-profit?

## Recommended next action
Ask for exact business ZIP and county. Send the user to Find Your SBDC and tell them to use ZIP or county lookup.
